name: Verify Send Money Form Load
expected: Send money form loads with payee options
steps: Assert Payee list or 'Add a new payee' option is present

name: Verify Add New Payee Validation
expected: Validation errors appear for invalid routing or account numbers
steps: Assert 'Routing number must be exactly 9 digits' error displays

name: Verify Successful Send Money
expected: Send money transaction succeeds and shows confirmation
steps: Click Review & Send, then Confirm & Send
Assert confirmation page shows 'Send Money Successful'

name: Verify Save Payee Functionality
expected: New payee is saved for future transactions when checkbox is selected
steps: Check 'Save this payee for future transfers'
Navigate back to Send Money page
Assert the new payee is now listed in the saved payees

name: Verify Insufficient Funds
expected: Error is shown if amount exceeds balance
steps: Enter an amount larger than the account balance

name: Verify Frozen Account Block
expected: Send money is disabled for frozen accounts
steps: Assert 'Sending money is disabled' banner is visible
Assert Review & Send button is disabled
